# PHLivePhotoEditingErrorCode.aborted

**Case**

Live Photo processing was canceled by the Processing an Editing Context’s Live Photo method.

## Declaration

```swift
case aborted
```

## Constants

- **PHLivePhotoEditingErrorCode.unknown**: No further information is available about the cause of the error.

items.description: No further information is available about the cause of the error.
items.name: PHLivePhotoEditingErrorCode.unknown
